description: SELECT * returns all columns and should reuse the shared User model struct instead of creating a duplicate Row type

rust-sqlx.model_struct:
#[derive(Debug, sqlx::FromRow)]
pub struct User {
    pub id: i32,
    pub name: String,
    pub email: String,
    pub created_at: chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>,
}

expected.sqlc_comparison: sqlc creates duplicate types for SELECT * queries instead of reusing the model

name: select_all_reuses_model
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW());
